name: eliancpastor-sites
description: Monorepo of sites served at eliancpastor.github.io — portfolio hub at the root, each project mounted at a sub-path.

scripts.build: npm run build:portfolio && npm run build:resole && npm run build:aurum && npm run build:marea && npm run assemble
scripts.assemble: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/resole dist/aurum dist/marea && cp -R sites/portfolio/dist/. dist/ && cp -R sites/resole/dist/. dist/resole/ && cp -R sites/aurum/dist/. dist/aurum/ && cp -R sites/marea/dist/. dist/marea/ && find dist sites/*/dist -name '* 2*' -prune -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; true
